name: iavverificationmanagement
author: Siemens Product Lifecycle Management Software Inc.

IAV1AddContentToTableAsChildCondition.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddChild && ctx.TR_TPTableSelection.length > 0 && conditions.IAV1TROrTEOpenedCondition && conditions.IAV1TPOrTMNotSelectedCondition && conditions.IAV1TROrTENotSelectedCondition === true && conditions.IAV1AddCondition === true

IAV1AddContentToTableAsSiblingCondition.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddSibling && ctx.TR_TPTableSelection.length > 0 && conditions.IAV1TROrTEOpenedCondition && conditions.IAV1TPOrTMNotSelectedCondition && conditions.IAV1TROrTENotSelectedCondition === true && conditions.IAV1AddCondition === true

removeFromTestRequestForTPVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1RemoveFromVerificationRequest && ctx.TR_TPTableSelection.length > 0 && conditions.arVersionCondition && conditions.Crt1IsARInAuthoringState && conditions.Crt1IsOpnedObjModifiable && (conditions.testRequestVisiblity === true || conditions.testRequestVisiblityForInputPage === true) && ctx.mselected[0].modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0 && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '1'

removeFromTestRequestForTMVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1RemoveFromVerificationRequest && ctx.TR_TMTableSelection.length > 0 && conditions.arVersionCondition && conditions.Crt1IsARInAuthoringState && conditions.Crt1IsOpnedObjModifiable && (conditions.testRequestVisiblity === true || conditions.testRequestVisiblityForInputPage === true) && ctx.mselected[0].modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0 && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '1'
